title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Kozhikode

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Kozhikode
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Kozhikode. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About IIM Kozhikode:
IIM Kozhikode is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode!
